use_cases: Full-screen hero section for Web3 and cryptocurrency project landing pages
Animated entry point for DeFi platforms and NFT marketplaces
Futuristic hero banner for blockchain-based SaaS applications
Animated header for crypto exchange or Web3 gaming platforms
ai_summary: A full-screen animated Web3 landing page hero featuring symmetric animated pillar/bar elements that animate on mount, luminous red-to-violet elliptical gradient backgrounds, and subtle pulsing glow effects. The component uses CSS keyframe animations (fadeInUp and subtlePulse) with a dark futuristic aesthetic and self-contained inline styles for portability. Ideal for Web3, DeFi, and blockchain project landing pages.
